user.title: Voice Agent Router
user.description: Configure your LLM-powered voice agent router.

data_description.api_key: API key from openrouter.ai — used for cloud LLM fallback.

abort.already_configured: Voice Agent Router is already configured.

data_description.system_prompt: System prompt sent to the LLM with each conversation turn.
data_description.temperature: Sampling temperature (0.0 - 1.0). Lower is more deterministic.
data_description.max_tool_iterations: Maximum number of tool-call rounds per turn (1-50).
data_description.enable_local_router: Use regex fast-path to handle simple commands offline before calling the LLM.
data_description.send_bug_reports: Send anonymous error reports to help improve the integration. No personal data is collected.
